description: Custom Business Object Type Mappings - Tracks custom types and their BAW class IDs to enable reuse across widgets

ProgressData.description: Business object representing progress bar data

notes.usage: This file tracks custom business objects to prevent duplicates and enable sharing across widgets
notes.classId_format: Custom types use /12.{guid} format where the GUID is generated once and reused
notes.widgets: List of widgets that use this custom type
notes.auto_update: This file is automatically updated when new custom types are generated
